---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve netscope
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run `netscope -i [...]` or `netscope -r file.pcap`
2. Navigate to [...]
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- netscope version / commit: [e.g. v0.1.0, `git log --oneline -1`]
- Rust version: `rustc --version`
- Npcap version (Windows only):

## Packet capture (if applicable)

If the bug involves parsing, please attach or link to a minimal `.pcap` file
that triggers the issue.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
